name: CareerOS · Morning Digest
description: mini-Jarvis: your pet greets you each morning with your day — today's calendar, weather, and job-hunt brief. Personal accounts only; your calendar link stays on your machine.

digestTime.label: Morning digest time
digestTime.description: When your pet delivers the daily digest.

city.label: Your city (for weather)
city.description: e.g. Philadelphia — leave blank to skip weather.

icalUrl.label: Google Calendar secret iCal link
icalUrl.description: Calendar → Settings → your calendar → 'Secret address in iCal format' (ends in .ics). Stays on your machine; leave blank to skip calendar.

trackerUrl.label: Tracker sheet URL (for follow-up reminders)
trackerUrl.description: Your CareerOS tracker's Apps Script /exec URL. Pre-filled; used to remind you which applications are due for a follow-up. Blank = skip.

greetOnLaunch.label: Greet on launch
greetOnLaunch.description: Also deliver the digest when OpenPets starts (once per day).
